tasks.instruction: Uzupełnij poniższe zdania (1.1.–1.10.), wybierając właściwy wariant odpowiedzi. Zakreśl literę A, B albo C.

items.stem: Neither Tom _______ his brother likes swimming.
The woman _______ car was stolen reported it to the police.
There isn't _______ milk left in the fridge.
She speaks English well _______ she has never been to England.
He is _______ tallest boy in the class.
You _______ wear a uniform at this school. It's the rule.
This is the town _______ I was born.
She asked me _______ I had finished my homework.
The film was _______ boring that we left the cinema early.
I'd rather _______ at home tonight than go to the party.
